items.text: Note: Act 4 (the islands of Ngamakanui) is non-linear — boss order may vary
Isle of Kin: defeat The Blind Beast
Volcanic Warrens: defeat Krutog, Lord of Kin
Shrike Island: defeat Scourge of the Skies
Whakapanu Island: defeat the Great White One
Singing Caverns: defeat Diamora, Song of Death
Arastas: defeat Torvian, Hand of the Saviour
The Excavation: defeat Benedictus, First Herald of Utopia
Halls of the Dead: defeat Yama the White
Heart of the Tribe: defeat Tavakai, the Chieftain (Act boss, 3 phases)
Complete the Trail of the Ancestors, speak to Hinekora → +2 weapon-set skill points
Isle of Kin: The Blind Beast → +2 weapon-set skill points
Yama the White drops a Silver Coin → take it to the Trail of the Ancestors → +2 passive skill points
Beast Pen: claim the Level 12 Uncut Skill Gem
Heart of the Tribe: clear the Meeting House bonus objective for free loot
